modules.title: Intake Orchestration
modules.summary: Source roots, glob filters, and extension rules produce normalized sidecars and deterministic manifest writes.

modules.title: Email De-duplication Engine
modules.summary: Overlapping exports are merged by signature, preserving strongest date confidence and removing redundant traffic.

modules.title: Sync Payload Planner
modules.summary: Before live writes, operations can emit explicit create/update payload plans for review and replay safety.

modules.title: Override Governance
modules.summary: Manual case-link directives capture mode and rationale while preserving auditability for reprocessing.

modules.title: Consistency Sweep
modules.summary: Repo sweep identifies missing manifest paths, uncataloged canonical files, and sidecar coverage gaps.

modules.title: Daily Tactical Briefing
modules.summary: today/case command paths convert raw corpus state into immediate operator runway and next actions.

pipeline: Intake source files from controlled roots
Map artifacts to matter + pattern surfaces
Stage operator payloads and runway boards

qc_checks.name: Manifest-path integrity
qc_checks.description: Every tracked row resolves to a valid repo-relative source path.

qc_checks.name: Sidecar coverage
qc_checks.description: Canonical PDFs and text assets expose normalized Markdown derivatives.

qc_checks.name: Duplicate-family control
qc_checks.description: Variant families are clustered so duplicates are visible without collapsing canonical truth.

qc_checks.name: Payload validation
qc_checks.description: Sync plans can be inspected before any external write is attempted.

readiness_lanes.name: Deposition prep lane
readiness_lanes.description: Witness statements, chronology gaps, and outline anchors are surfaced in one pass.

readiness_lanes.name: Mediation packet lane
readiness_lanes.description: Records, treatment, and damages notes stage into packet-ready structure.

readiness_lanes.name: Deadline runway lane
readiness_lanes.description: Events are converted into urgency bands for portfolio triage.
